response.justification: While the candidate possesses strong software craftsmanship, mentoring experience, and a solid background in full-stack and distributed systems development (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang), they fall significantly short of the core technical requirements. The role requires 8 years of C++ programming and extensive experience building large-scale cloud compute infrastructure, whereas the candidate has less than a year of professional C++ experience and primarily focuses on web platforms and SaaS applications.
strengths: Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring, including organizing workshops, courses, and refactoring dojos.
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, testing (TDD), and establishing engineering best practices.
Solid background in software design and architecture across various domains, including microservices and event-driven platforms.
concerns: Fails to meet the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience, possessing only around 7 months professionally.
Lacks deep experience building low-level cloud compute infrastructure, focusing primarily on full-stack web and SaaS applications.
Current technology stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with the C++ heavy requirements of the role.
